// description: HiGHS golden variant for the SDDP cut-I/O hot-start round-trip case
this checks the converged policy reproduced from the loaded cut set,
but pins only the solver-robust invariants: total objective (phase 1
obj_value = 323 100), the drained terminal reservoir, and the
marginal balance dual.  HiGHS walks a different degenerate-optimum
corner than CLP, so the per-phase obj split and the phase-1 dispatch
pinned by the shared golden do not transfer.  No `solver_status`
block because iter=0 (sim-only) runs do not emit solver_status.json.
